column1: ATDD - Committee Decision Logic Change
column28: As a user, I want documents of account aggregator to be stored in single document code , so that all the respective documents can be found at single place only.
column630:
'+*Current Process*+

Within the system, there are currently *three types of committee approval mechanisms* configured for decision-making on applications:
|*Committee Type*|*Description*|
|*Minimum Approvals*|A decision is considered final if *Minimum approval is provided*|
|*Decision Maker* |A designated *single decision maker’s* input is treated as the *final verdict* of the committee.|
|*General Majority*|The committee verdict is finalized based on *majority votes* from all configured members.|

In the Minimum Approval Committee, the verdict is finalized prematurely when minimum members provide their decision (Approve/Reject), excluding the other member from the process entirely.

Additionally, when mixed decisions are provided by the members (e.g., 3 approve, 1 reject in a 5-member committee), the final verdict remains pending indefinitely, causing confusion and delays.

 

+*New Process:-*+

The *Minimum Approval Committee logic should be enhanced* to:
 * Minimum Approval Committee
 ** New Rule
 *** Final verdict is derived post minimum approval but 100% member participation shall be ensured
 *** Verdict Logic (After All Inputs)

||Scenario (5 Members)||Votes||Final Verdict||
|4 Approve, 1 Any|Minimum Approval|*APPROVED*|
|4 Reject, 1 Any|Minimum Rejected|*REJECTED*|
|3 Approve, 2 Reject|Minimum Approved|*Approved*|
|Any Split|Mixed|*As per majority view*|
 * The system should *not finalize or block* a verdict prematurely or indefinitely.

*Decision Authority*
 * *Decision Maker’s vote still determines the committee verdict*

New Participation Rule
 * Other members *must still submit their decisions*
 ** Their votes are:
 *** Stored for *audit*
 *** Visible in *committee history*
 *** Not used for verdict calculation
 * Committee Status Flow
 * Committee members tasks of other members remain open

h3. Majority Approval Committee
h4. Decision Logic
 * Majority rule *unchanged*
 * Participation Rule (New)
 * All members must provide inputs *even after majority is achieved*

h4. Status Flow
 * Verdict: Declared as soon as majority is mathematically reached
 * Committee Status remains open until:
 ** *All member decisions are captured*

*It needs to be build in configurable manner so as existing implementation don't get impacted, with by default nature to be as is working*

column1: ATDD - Guarantor details capturing for Credit Card application
column28: As a user, I want guarantor details to be captured for credit card application, so that loans for which primary collateral is not sufficient can be given through guarantor.
column162: A customer applies for a secured credit card but does not have sufficient personal collateral. The bank allows a guarantor (another individual) to provide collateral on behalf of the customer to ensure end-to-end processing and visibility of this relationship.
column401: Log in to FinnOne Neo>>CAS>>Aplications>>Credit Card Application
column630:
'+*Current Process:-*+

There is no provision to capture the guarantor details for credit card application.

+*New Process:-*+

Provision to be made to capture the guarantor details for credit card application in the system. This should be application for all the request type(Add on Card, Business Credit card, {-}Card Limit Update{-}, Corporate Credit Credit, Individual business Credit card, Individual Corporate Credit Card, New Credit Card application, Prepaid Card ) available in sourcing details.
 * Activity should be updated as per the details for any LOB in which guarantor is added on every screen as per the existing functionality.
 * Customer communication history to be updated as per the existing functionality.

1. Changes in Applicant Information page at CCDE stage
 * Add Add-on applicant should be renamed to add another applicant
 * When user click on this, applicant type should be enabled and 2 values(Add-on & Guarantor) should be displayed in the drop down. When Guarantor is selected, relationship field should be displayed as mandatory.
 * Applicant type for New customer(Individual, non-individual) and existing customer should work as it is. Cascading fields corresponding should be displayed as it is.
 * Remove button should be available to remove the applicant.
 * Personal Information, employment details, financial details, Bank / Credit Card details & KYC details piano bars should be displayed to capture the guaranor details with all the existing fields, buttons and accordions to be displayed and saved as per the exisiting functionality.
 * Customer swap, remove and customer refresh functionality to work as it is.
 * -*Placeholder to be added for add-on applicant information page.*-

In income details, following accordions are present for each employment type:-
 * Agriculture: Agriculture income, crop income, agriculture, assets and liability details are present
 * For others: Assets and liability details
 * For Salaried: Assets and liabilities
 * SENP: Income details, other income details,deductions, expense details, asset and liabilities
 * SEP: Income details, other income details,deductions, expense details, asset and liability details.

Also, fields are present for agriculture, salaried, others

3. Changes in KYC/Video KYC
 * Applicant type as guarantor should be present in KYC below primary applicant and add-on applicant. 
 * Dedupe summary and KYC checklist should be same as per the existing functionality of the KYC.
 * Video KYC can be initiated for guarantor as well.

4. Changes in documents
 * Documents related to guarantor should be available in the documents tab. All the existing functionalities should work as it is.
 * Impact to be taken in view summary in documents tab as well for received, pending and deferred documents of guarantor. Also, in upper ribbon, guarantor name should be present as well as attached in the Screenshot. Same should be printed in the pdf & print also.
 * In accept additional documents, when refernce type is selected as customer, then in entity type guarantor name shoule be visible & its corresponding documents should be visible in documents dropdown.
 * In Available documents(Under Raise query), guarantor documents should be visible in the list. Also, in applicants list available in raise query, co-applicant along with the name should be visible.

5. Changes in KYC (KYC check)
 * KYC check should be applicable for guarantor as well. All other functionalities should be same as well.  Applicants, de dupe summary, kyc checklist should be visible as well. All interfaces applicable fro guarantor should be visible.

6. Changes in FII, FIV, FIC
 * FI should be initiated for guarantor as well. A separate column for gurantor should be visible. All other functionalities should work as it is. All type of verifications are applicable for guarantor as well. 

7. Changes in recommendation
 * In applicant information accordion, guarantor details should also be visible .Mock has been attached. When applicant details is clicked for guarantor, all the details should be present.
 * In intent indicators, Field investigations, KYC check, Video KYC, Credit bureau check results should also be visible for guarantor.
 * Exposure details should be applicable for guarantor also. All the functionalities as per the exposure details should be applicable for this also.

8. Changes in credit approval
 * All the policies and ratios which are run at backend should include guarantor details also for the result.
 * In applicant's profile, guarantor details should also be visible. All the functionalities for this should work as it is.
 * In CAM report, provision should be added to view guarantor details in applicant information section, employment details, financial details, Bank / Credit Card details, KYC details, verification details, document received for(include guarantor details)

9. Miscellaneous Changes
 * Activity impact to be taken.
 * In enquiry, all the impact to be considered.

10. Sent to Card management system
 * In CMS, gurantor details should be visible in applicant information. 
 * Eligibility policy ratios to include guranator details as in other product types. Also, in exposure details, guarantor details to be included

Services Impact
 # createApplication[CAS_Appl_01]
 # UpdateApplication[CAS_Appl_2]
 # createCustomer[GCD_01]
 # updateCustomer[GCD_02]
 # Copy application
 # Search Application

column1: Backporting GA 7.0 - Multiple Credit Card processing in Omni Loan | Req type - Business and Corporate credit card
column28: As a system user, I want that I should be able to attach one or more secured credit card or unsecured credit card for the same primary customer. so, that I should be able to add the same in the omni loan package and process them together so, that the processing time could be saved.
column163:
*{color:#172b4d}+LEAD DETAILS: LOAN DETAILS: SOURCING DETAILS+{color}*
 * {color:#172b4d}Multiple Business/Corporate cards of same primary customer with different card types can be added in the Omni-loan application.{color}
 * {color:#172b4d}When user selects the product type as credit card then application type will change to request type and values will be new credit card application, Business credit cards and corporate credit cards. {color}
 * {color:#172b4d}When user selects the request type only then the add/view card details hyperlink will be visible.{color}
 * When request type - new credit card application will be selected then there will be no change in the hyperlink except request type will be outside the hyperlink and product field will come in place of request type. 
 * When request type - business/corporate credit card will be selected and user clicks on the add/view credit card details hyperlink then header name will change to 'commercial card details' and multiple credit cards can be added as given in the screenshot (Refer screenshot 1). Is primary product will also be removed as it is moved inside the hyperlink.
 * Calculation of total card limit requested field will remain as is and will consider the card limit of corporate/business card as well.
 * Loan purpose will be brought at sub loan level on sourcing and will be removed from omni level.
 * At sourcing now user should be able to take multiple sub loans with same product type, product and scheme. However, the combination of product type, product, scheme and loan purpose should be unique. Validation is required to handle the same 'Sub-loan with the same Product Type, Product, Scheme, and Loan Purpose already exists.'

 *+LEAD DETAILS: LOAN DETAILS: CARD DETAILS+*
 * Request type for business/corporate card in card details will be as per the request type selected at sourcing.
 * Add on cards and companion cards are not supported for business/corporate cards.
 * Sorting is required in every column of card details grid.
 * Currency of requested limit in card details will be as per mapping in product. Also, add on card currency will be same as of primary card and will be non-editable.

*+DDE : COLLATERAL DETAILS+*
 * The system should allow the user to take the relevant collateral for the Secured Credit Card tranches. Collateral for credit cards should adhere all the details mentioned in this story CAS-219307
 * Collateral investigation stages are required to be seeded in product for credit cards and details should be visible on recommendation, credit approval and reconsideration stages like other LOBs.

{color:#172b4d}*+RECOMMENDATION+*{color}
 * Business/corporate credit cards will also be visible under product type decision list and the behaviour will be same as is wroking currently for other credit cards.

*{color:#172b4d}+CREDIT APPROVAL : PRODUCT TYPE DECISION LIST+{color}*
 * Business/corporate credit cards will also be visible under product type decision list and the behaviour will be same as is wroking currently for other credit cards.

*{color:#172b4d}+RECONSIDERATION:+{color}*
 * Behavior will be same as individual cards.

*{color:#172b4d}+OPERATIONS CHECK:+{color}*
 * Behavior will be same as individual cards.

+{color:#172b4d}*SEND TO CARD MANAGEMENT SYSTEM:*{color}+
 *  Recommendation page of Omni loan with only credit cards should be visible.
column423: Note : The impacted areas as analysed by PSG are as mentioned in the Story. Engineering to check and confirm regarding any other areas which have been missed here in the Playback so. that the same can be accounted for.
column630:
'+Current Functionality+ 

Currently, in the system the user can not add business and corporate credit cards (both unsecured and secured) in the omni loan package.

+Required Functionality+

The user should be able to add multiple business and corporate credit cards (both secured and unsecured) in the omni-loan application when the user applies for an omni loan under the Omni Loan Product consisting of the same.

column1: ATDD - GA 9.0 - Add on Applicant - Dynamic form Placeholder
column630:
* A dynamic form placeholder is required on the add on applicant's personal information screen of credit card application. Placeholder name: CAS_CUSTOM_FIELDS_SCREEN_ADD_ON_APPLICANT

column1: Backporting GA 7.0 - API to send back the application to previous stage
column28: As a user I want an API to send back the application so that user do not have to login to CAS to send back the application.
column630:
A new API is required to send back the application to previous stage.

Following will be the fields which are to be sent in the request.
|S.No.|TECHNICAL NAME|DATA TYPE|OPTIONAL/MANDATORY|DESCRIPTION|SAMPLE VALUE|
|1.1|ApplicationNumber|String|Mandatory|This field signifies the application number of the application|APPLXXXX|
|1.2|SendbackFromStage|String|Mandatory|This field signifies the stage from which the application will be sent back|DDE|
|1.3|SendbackToStage|String|Mandatory|This field signifies the stage to which the application will be sent back|Lead Details|
|1.4|ReasonForSendback|List| | | |
|1.4.1|ReasonCode|String|Mandatory|This field signifies the reason code for send back of the application|Others|
|1.4.2|ReasonDescription|String|Optional|This field signifies the description of the reason  of the sendback. It is mandatory if reason code is 'Others'|XYZ|
|1.5|Remarks|String|Optional|This field signifies the remarks to be added for sending back the application|XYZ|

 

Response will have following fields:
|S.No.|TECHNICAL NAME|DATA TYPE|OPTIONAL/MANDATORY|DESCRIPTION|SAMPLE VALUE|POSSIBLE VALUES|
|1.1|Status|String|Mandatory|This field signifies the status of the request|Error|Success, Error|
|1.2|Error Message|String|Conditional Mandatory|This field signifies the error message| | |

 

Validations required:
 # If no valid stage found to send back the application then a validation should occur stating 'No valid stage is available to send back the application'. Let's say if user tries to send back the application from lead details.
 # If application number is not valid then display the error message stating 'Invalid Application No.'
 # If SendbackFrom stage is invalid then display 'Invalid SendbackFrom Stage' 
 # If SendbackTo stage is invalid then display 'Invalid SendbackTo Stage'
 # If invalid reasoncode is passed then display 'Invalid reason code'
 # If reason code is passed as 'Others' and reason description is not passed then display 'Reason description is mandatory when reason code is passed as 'Others'
 # If send back from any stage is not allowed then display 'Application cannot be sent back from XYZ stage'. Let's say operations check.
 # If some user is already working on the application and some other user tries to send back the application from API then display an error message 'Application cannot be sent back as the application is currently in use by another user.'
 # If the user does not have the access of product, branch and scheme of the application which is being sent back then display a validation message stating 'User does not have access to the product, branch, or scheme of the application'

+*Requirement 3: API Documentation*+
 # API Documentation for the service CAS_Appl_XXX should be available at API Portal under Application Pack along with the updated description attached in the story.

|CAS |Application Pack|CAS_Appl_XXX|This API is used to send back the application to a previous stage. | |Rest |Outbound|Non-Licensable| |
 * API documentation should be made available in Catalog and seeding in license manger should be done.

column1: GA 9.0 - API to send back the application to previous stage
column28: As a user I want an API to send back the application so that user do not have to login to CAS to send back the application.
column630:
A new API is required to send back the application to previous stage.

Following will be the fields which are to be sent in the request.
|S.No.|TECHNICAL NAME|DATA TYPE|OPTIONAL/MANDATORY|DESCRIPTION|SAMPLE VALUE|
|1.1|ApplicationNumber|String|Mandatory|This field signifies the application number of the application|APPLXXXX|
|1.2|SendbackFromStage|String|Mandatory|This field signifies the stage from which the application will be sent back|DDE|
|1.3|SendbackToStage|String|Mandatory|This field signifies the stage to which the application will be sent back|Lead Details|
|1.4|ReasonForSendback|List| | | |
|1.4.1|ReasonCode|String|Mandatory|This field signifies the reason code for send back of the application|Others|
|1.4.2|ReasonDescription|String|Optional|This field signifies the description of the reason  of the sendback. It is mandatory if reason code is 'Others'|XYZ|
|1.5|Remarks|String|Optional|This field signifies the remarks to be added for sending back the application|XYZ|

 

Response will have following fields:
|S.No.|TECHNICAL NAME|DATA TYPE|OPTIONAL/MANDATORY|DESCRIPTION|SAMPLE VALUE|POSSIBLE VALUES|
|1.1|Status|String|Mandatory|This field signifies the status of the request|Error|Success, Error|
|1.2|Error Message|String|Conditional Mandatory|This field signifies the error message| | |

 

Validations required:
 # If no valid stage found to send back the application then a validation should occur stating 'No valid stage is available to send back the application'. Let's say if user tries to send back the application from lead details.
 # If application number is not valid then display the error message stating 'Invalid Application No.'
 # If SendbackFrom stage is invalid then display 'Invalid SendbackFrom Stage' 
 # If SendbackTo stage is invalid then display 'Invalid SendbackTo Stage'
 # If invalid reasoncode is passed then display 'Invalid reason code'
 # If reason code is passed as 'Others' and reason description is not passed then display 'Reason description is mandatory when reason code is passed as 'Others'
 # If send back from any stage is not allowed then display 'Application cannot be sent back from XYZ stage'. Let's say operations check.
 # If some user is already working on the application and some other user tries to send back the application from API then display an error message 'Application cannot be sent back as the application is currently in use by another user.'
 # If the user does not have the access of product, branch and scheme of the application which is being sent back then display a validation message stating 'User does not have access to the product, branch, or scheme of the application'

+*Requirement 3: API Documentation*+
 # API Documentation for the service CAS_Appl_XXX should be available at API Portal under Application Pack along with the updated description attached in the story.

|CAS |Application Pack|CAS_Appl_XXX|This API is used to send back the application to a previous stage. | |Rest |Outbound|Non-Licensable| |
 * API documentation should be made available in Catalog and seeding in license manger should be done.

column1: Backporting GA 7.0 - Branch-based authorization on the Document Collection Release Printing Screen
column28: As an user I want access of application through document document collection release printing screen to be restricted so that user can only access application whose branch and product rights are given to the user.
column91: 11/Mar/26 9:48 PM;gaurav.khanna;RE_ Arab Bank and HD Bank__Requirements__Backporting Approval.msg;https://jira.nucleussoftware.com/secure/attachment/2297218/RE_+Arab+Bank+and+HD+Bank__Requirements__Backporting+Approval.msg
column630:
*Current Process:*

Currently, the Document Collection Release Printing Screen allows users to view, upload, delete, or replace documents irrespective of the application’s associated branch and product.

Example: A user configured for Branch A can currently access and modify documents belonging to applications from Branch B.

*New Process:*
 * A new authority Document_Release_Printing_All_Access will be added to access all the applications from the Document Collection Release Printing Screen.
 * By default, user will only be able to access the application whose product and branch access is provided to the user in the user mater.
 * If no applicable application comes in the result, then no records found should be displayed on the screen.

column1: Backporting GA 7.0 - Cancel Confirm days at LOB level
column28: As an user I want application to be auto cancel confirm days to be maintained at LOB level so that user can maintain different cancel confirm days for different LOBs.
column92: 11/Mar/26 9:49 PM;gaurav.khanna;RE_ Arab Bank and HD Bank__Requirements__Backporting Approval.msg;https://jira.nucleussoftware.com/secure/attachment/2297219/RE_+Arab+Bank+and+HD+Bank__Requirements__Backporting+Approval.msg
column630:
*Current Process:*

The system currently relies on a configuration property (config.auto.cancel.days) that applies uniformly across all LOBs to cancel confirm the application.

This approach does not allow flexibility for different product types that may require distinct cancellation timelines.

*New Process:*

This configuration is required to be modified now at LOB level where user can enter separate cancel confirm days for different LOBs.

'+*Current Process:-*+

There is no provision to capture the guarantor details for credit card application.

+*New Process:-*+

Provision to be made to capture the guarantor details for credit card application in the system. This should be application for all the request type(Add on Card, Business Credit card, {-}Card Limit Update{-}, Corporate Credit Credit, Individual business Credit card, Individual Corporate Credit Card, New Credit Card application, Prepaid Card ) available in sourcing details.
 * Activity should be updated as per the details for any LOB in which guarantor is added on every screen as per the existing functionality.
 * Customer communication history to be updated as per the existing functionality.

1. Changes in Applicant Information page at CCDE stage
 * Add Add-on applicant should be renamed to add another applicant
 * When user click on this, applicant type should be enabled and 2 values(Add-on & Guarantor) should be displayed in the drop down. When Guarantor is selected, relationship field should be displayed as mandatory.
 * Applicant type for New customer(Individual, non-individual) and existing customer should work as it is. Cascading fields corresponding should be displayed as it is.
 * Remove button should be available to remove the applicant.
 * Personal Information, employment details, financial details, Bank / Credit Card details & KYC details piano bars should be displayed to capture the guaranor details with all the existing fields, buttons and accordions to be displayed and saved as per the exisiting functionality.
 * Customer swap, remove and customer refresh functionality to work as it is.
 * -*Placeholder to be added for add-on applicant information page.*-

In income details, following accordions are present for each employment type:-
 * Agriculture: Agriculture income, crop income, agriculture, assets and liability details are present
 * For others: Assets and liability details
 * For Salaried: Assets and liabilities
 * SENP: Income details, other income details,deductions, expense details, asset and liabilities
 * SEP: Income details, other income details,deductions, expense details, asset and liability details.

Also, fields are present for agriculture, salaried, others

3. Changes in KYC/Video KYC
 * Applicant type as guarantor should be present in KYC below primary applicant and add-on applicant. 
 * Dedupe summary and KYC checklist should be same as per the existing functionality of the KYC.
 * Video KYC can be initiated for guarantor as well.

4. Changes in documents
 * Documents related to guarantor should be available in the documents tab. All the existing functionalities should work as it is.
 * Impact to be taken in view summary in documents tab as well for received, pending and deferred documents of guarantor. Also, in upper ribbon, guarantor name should be present as well as attached in the Screenshot. Same should be printed in the pdf & print also.
 * In accept additional documents, when refernce type is selected as customer, then in entity type guarantor name shoule be visible & its corresponding documents should be visible in documents dropdown.
 * In Available documents(Under Raise query), guarantor documents should be visible in the list. Also, in applicants list available in raise query, co-applicant along with the name should be visible.

5. Changes in KYC (KYC check)
 * KYC check should be applicable for guarantor as well. All other functionalities should be same as well.  Applicants, de dupe summary, kyc checklist should be visible as well. All interfaces applicable fro guarantor should be visible.

6. Changes in FII, FIV, FIC
 * FI should be initiated for guarantor as well. A separate column for gurantor should be visible. All other functionalities should work as it is. All type of verifications are applicable for guarantor as well. 

7. Changes in recommendation
 * In applicant information accordion, guarantor details should also be visible .Mock has been attached. When applicant details is clicked for guarantor, all the details should be present.
 * In intent indicators, Field investigations, KYC check, Video KYC, Credit bureau check results should also be visible for guarantor.
 * Exposure details should be applicable for guarantor also. All the functionalities as per the exposure details should be applicable for this also.

8. Changes in credit approval
 * All the policies and ratios which are run at backend should include guarantor details also for the result.
 * In applicant's profile, guarantor details should also be visible. All the functionalities for this should work as it is.
 * In CAM report, provision should be added to view guarantor details in applicant information section, employment details, financial details, Bank / Credit Card details, KYC details, verification details, document received for(include guarantor details)

9. Miscellaneous Changes
 * Activity impact to be taken.
 * In enquiry, all the impact to be considered.

10. Sent to Card management system
 * In CMS, gurantor details should be visible in applicant information. 
 * Eligibility policy ratios to include guranator details as in other product types. Also, in exposure details, guarantor details to be included

 # Copy application

column1: Committee Decision Logic Change
column28: As a user, I want documents of account aggregator to be stored in single document code , so that all the respective documents can be found at single place only.
column98: Not Applicable (Story Extension of Previous Sprint Story)
column630:
'+*Current Process*+

Within the system, there are currently *three types of committee approval mechanisms* configured for decision-making on applications:
|*Committee Type*|*Description*|
|*Minimum Approvals*|A decision is considered final if *Minimum approval is provided*|
|*Decision Maker* |A designated *single decision maker’s* input is treated as the *final verdict* of the committee.|
|*General Majority*|The committee verdict is finalized based on *majority votes* from all configured members.|

In the Minimum Approval Committee, the verdict is finalized prematurely when minimum members provide their decision (Approve/Reject), excluding the other member from the process entirely.

Additionally, when mixed decisions are provided by the members (e.g., 3 approve, 1 reject in a 5-member committee), the final verdict remains pending indefinitely, causing confusion and delays.

 

+*New Process:-*+

The *Minimum Approval Committee logic should be enhanced* to:
 * Minimum Approval Committee
 ** New Rule
 *** Final verdict is derived post minimum approval but 100% member participation shall be ensured
 *** Verdict Logic (After All Inputs)

||Scenario (5 Members)||Votes||Final Verdict||
|4 Approve, 1 Any|Minimum Approval|*APPROVED*|
|4 Reject, 1 Any|Minimum Rejected|*REJECTED*|
|3 Approve, 2 Reject|Minimum Approved|*Approved*|
|Any Split|Mixed|*As per majority view*|
 * The system should *not finalize or block* a verdict prematurely or indefinitely.

*Decision Authority*
 * *Decision Maker’s vote still determines the committee verdict*

New Participation Rule
 * Other members *must still submit their decisions*
 ** Their votes are:
 *** Stored for *audit*
 *** Visible in *committee history*
 *** Not used for verdict calculation
 * Committee Status Flow
 * Committee members tasks of other members remain open

h3. Majority Approval Committee
h4. Decision Logic
 * Majority rule *unchanged*
 * Participation Rule (New)
 * All members must provide inputs *even after majority is achieved*

h4. Status Flow
 * Verdict: Declared as soon as majority is mathematically reached
 * Committee Status remains open until:
 ** *All member decisions are captured*

*It needs to be build in configurable manner so as existing implementation don't get impacted, with by default nature to be as is working*

column1: Multiple Credit Card processing in Omni Loan | Req type - Business and Corporate credit card
column28: As a system user, I want that I should be able to attach one or more secured credit card or unsecured credit card for the same primary customer. so, that I should be able to add the same in the omni loan package and process them together so, that the processing time could be saved.
column163:
*{color:#172b4d}+OMNI PRODUCT POLICY MATSER:+{color}*
 * Currently only individual type products are filtered in loan product autocomplete field. Now, non-individual credit cards (Business and corporate) can also be added in the omni product policy master.
 * Filtration of business/corporate credit cards on transaction will be as per the master maintenance as working for individual credit cards.

 

*{color:#172b4d}+LEAD DETAILS: LOAN DETAILS: SOURCING DETAILS+{color}*
 * {color:#172b4d}Multiple Business/Corporate cards of same primary customer with different card types can be added in the Omni-loan application.{color}
 * {color:#172b4d}When user selects the product type as credit card then application type will change to request type and values will be new credit card application, Business credit cards and corporate credit cards. {color}
 * {color:#172b4d}When user selects the request type only then the add/view card details hyperlink will be visible.{color}
 * When request type - new credit card application will be selected then there will be no change in the hyperlink except request type will be outside the hyperlink and product field will come in place of request type. 
 * Requested amount field outside the modal window will be freezed in case of business/corporate credit cards. Requested amount at sourcing will show summation of the requested amount of all the products added in the business/corporate cards.
 * When request type - business/corporate credit card will be selected and user clicks on the add/view credit card details hyperlink then header name will change to 'commercial card details' and multiple credit cards can be added as given in the screenshot (Refer screenshot 1).
 * Calculation of total card limit requested field will remain as is and will consider the card limit of corporate/business card as well.
 * Application purpose and application description field will be brought at sub loan level on sourcing and will be removed from omni level.
 * At sourcing now user should be able to take multiple sub loans with same product type, product and scheme. However, the combination of product type, product, scheme and loan purpose should be unique. Validation is required to handle the same 'Sub-loan with the same Product Type, Product, Scheme, and Loan Purpose already exists.'
 * In Omni product details accordion of sourcing details, Application type header will be changed to Application/Request Type.
 * Request type filteration will be done as per applicant type. If individual applicant is added the in request type only new credit card application will be displayed. If non individual applicant is added then in request type only Business and corporate credit card will be displayed.
 * Scheme will be hidden in case of credit card.

 *+LEAD DETAILS: LOAN DETAILS: CARD DETAILS+*
 * Request type for business/corporate card in card details will be as per the request type selected at sourcing.
 * Add on cards and companion cards are not supported for business/corporate cards.
 * Sorting is required in every column of card details grid.
 * Currency of requested limit in card details will be as per mapping in product. Also, add on card currency will be same as of primary card and will be non-editable.

*+DDE : COLLATERAL DETAILS+*
 * The system should allow the user to take the relevant collateral for the Secured Credit Card tranches. Collateral for credit cards should adhere all the details mentioned in this story CAS-219307
 * Collateral investigation stages are required to be seeded in product for credit cards and details should be visible on recommendation, credit approval and reconsideration stages like other LOBs.

{color:#172b4d}*+RECOMMENDATION+*{color}
 * Business/corporate credit cards will also be visible under product type decision list and the behaviour will be same as is working currently for other credit cards.
 * In credit cards section, Request type column will be added after the tranche ID column.
 * Max cards issued field to be added for business/corporate card. For new credit card application field will remain freezed.

*{color:#172b4d}+CREDIT APPROVAL : PRODUCT TYPE DECISION LIST+{color}*
 * Business/corporate credit cards will also be visible under product type decision list and the behaviour will be same as is working currently for other credit cards.
 * In credit cards section, Request type column will be added after the tranche ID column.
 * In credit card application only parent product's policies are calculated and shown on UI and same behavior will be present for OMNI application too.

*{color:#172b4d}+CAM REPORT:+{color}*
 * In CAM report under Credit card details, separate blocks of each cards of business/corporate card will be added.

*{color:#172b4d}+RECONSIDERATION:+{color}*
 * Behavior will be same as individual cards.

*{color:#172b4d}+OPERATIONS CHECK:+{color}*
 * Behavior will be same as individual cards.

+{color:#172b4d}*SEND TO CARD MANAGEMENT SYSTEM:*{color}+
 *  Recommendation page of Omni loan should be visible. {+}**{+}{*}{*}

+{color:#172b4d}*APPLICATION CREATE:*{color}+
 * {color:#172b4d}A separate block will be added in sourcing details of application create service where list of cards can be added for business/corporate credit cards.{color}
